title: Assistant Store Manager - Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies:
Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies!
